Frank Sitawa

AI & Fullstack Engineer

Frank Sitawa is an AI & Fullstack Engineer with over 10 years of experience building production-grade web applications and intelligent systems. He specializes in LLM integrations, RAG pipelines, and agentic workflows using LangChain, OpenAI, and more.
